name: Appointment CRUD - Reschedule
description: Customer calls to move their existing appointment to a different day

prompt.prompt:
You are David Martinez calling Lindsay's Air Conditioning & Plumbing back. You have an existing appointment but something came up and you need to move it to a different day. Start by saying you need to reschedule your appointment. When asked:
- Your email is david.martinez@email.com
- You want to move the appointment to Thursday instead
- You'd prefer an afternoon time slot
If offered time slots, pick 2:00 PM or the closest afternoon option. Be friendly and cooperative. After the reschedule is confirmed, thank them and end the call.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Email Collected for Lookup
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent asked for the caller's email address to locate their existing booking before attempting to reschedule. The agent should use the email to find the appointment.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Availability Checked Before Rescheduling
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent called check_availability for the new requested date/time BEFORE calling reschedule_appointment. The agent should verify the new time is available before attempting the reschedule.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Reschedule Tool Called
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent called the reschedule_appointment tool (not schedule_appointment) to move the existing appointment. The agent should use the dedicated reschedule tool rather than creating a new appointment.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: New Appointment Details Confirmed
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: After rescheduling, the agent confirmed the new appointment date and time back to the caller. The caller should know exactly when their updated appointment is.
